name: TimeGPT (Nixtla)
pricing_notes: Free tier: 500 API calls/month; paid plans from $99/mo

auth.notes: Nixtla API key required from dashboard

performance.notes: API call latency 200-500ms; zero-shot forecasting without training; much faster than training custom models

agent_readiness.notes: World's first time series foundation model for zero-shot forecasting. Send historical data, get forecasts — no training required. Outperforms Prophet and ARIMA on diverse benchmarks. Anomaly detection. Confidence intervals. Cross-validation utilities. Python/R/REST API. Handles multiple series simultaneously. Also includes TimeLLM and other Nixtla models.

gotchas: Proprietary hosted API — data sent to Nixtla servers
Zero-shot may underperform fine-tuned models on domain-specific data
Cannot inspect model internals for compliance/explainability
best_when: Quick prototyping before investing in custom model training
Teams without time series expertise needing production forecasts
Anomaly detection in time series data
avoid_when: Privacy-sensitive data (time series sent to external API)
High-volume forecasting (API costs add up quickly)
Regulated industries requiring explainable model internals
summary: TimeGPT is Nixtla's zero-shot time series foundation model. Send historical data via API, receive forecasts — no training required. Outperforms Prophet and ARIMA on diverse benchmarks. Anomaly detection and confidence intervals included. Python/REST SDK. Best for rapid prototyping and teams without time series expertise. Data sent to Nixtla servers; not for privacy-sensitive applications.
